hubSlugs.title: Game hub slugs to scrape
hubSlugs.description: If empty, scrape all discovered hubs. Example: ["cs-2", "dota-2"]

maxHubs.title: Maximum hubs
maxHubs.description: 0 = unlimited. Limits number of game hubs processed.

headful.title: Run headful
headful.description: Launch a visible browser (useful for debugging).
